title: Date conversion returns undefined for string input
symptom: When trying to convert a date from seconds to a formatted string, the output is 'undefined'. This occurs when referencing a date stored as a string instead of a number.
applies_when: Input date is a string representation of a timestamp
not_this_if: Input date is a valid number
root_cause: The DateTime.fromSeconds function expects a numeric input for timestamps. If the input is a string, it will not be able to process it correctly, resulting in an 'undefined' output.
fix_steps: Convert the string timestamp to a number using Number() function.
Update the expression to use Number($json.mosyle.date_enroll) instead of $json.mosyle.date_enroll.
agent_instruction: Modify the expression to convert the string timestamp to a number before passing it to DateTime.fromSeconds.
